title: Tottenham will go down - Sutton
summary: Pundit Chris Sutton believes Tottenham face the threat of relegation, with debate over whether new manager Roberto de Zerbi can reverse their form and keep them in the Premier League. His comments reflect serious concerns about Spurs' current trajectory.
content: Football Focus pundits Chris Sutton and Steph Houghton discuss whether Roberto de Zerbi can improve Spurs and keep them in the Premier League.

zh.title: 热刺将降级 - 萨顿
zh.summary: 评论员克里斯·萨顿认为热刺面临降级威胁，人们对新主教练罗伯托·德·泽尔比是否能够扭转球队战绩并将其留在英超的问题进行了讨论。他的评论反映了人们对热刺目前发展轨迹的严重担忧。

title: What is going on with Garnacho?
summary: Alejandro Garnacho is struggling to make an impact at Chelsea following his £40m transfer from Manchester United, raising questions about his ability to fulfill his potential at Stamford Bridge. The young winger's slow start highlights adaptation challenges for high-profile signings.
content: Alejandro Garnacho is struggling to stand out at Chelsea - so can the £40m signing from Manchester United still realise his potential at Stamford Bridge?

zh.title: 加纳乔现在怎么样了？
zh.summary: 亚历杭德罗·加纳乔在从曼联以4000万英镑转会切尔西后，努力在球队中产生影响，引发了人们对他是否能够在斯坦福桥实现潜力的质疑。这位年轻边锋的缓慢开局突出了高调引援的适应挑战。

title: Wales told to show up in Albania qualifiers
summary: Wales coach Rhian Wilkinson is demanding her team deliver a strong showing in their Women's World Cup qualifying double-header against Albania as they battle to finish top of their group. The result will be crucial for Wales' path toward World Cup qualification.
content: Rhian Wilkinson tells Wales they must "show up" in their Women's World Cup qualifying double-header against Albania in bid to finish top of group.

zh.title: 威尔士被要求在阿尔巴尼亚预选赛中展现实力
zh.summary: 威尔士主教练里昂·威尔金森要求她的球队在与阿尔巴尼亚的女子世界杯预选赛两回合中表现出色，因为她们争取在小组中名列前茅。这个结果对威尔士争夺世界杯资格的道路至关重要。

title: Messi denied late, Miami still winless at new home
summary: Inter Miami drew 2-2 with the New York Red Bulls despite Lionel Messi seeing a late free kick saved, extending their winless streak at their new stadium. The result highlights Miami's ongoing struggles at their new venue despite having one of football's greatest players.
content: Lionel Messi had a free kick saved in stoppage time as Inter Miami drew 2-2 with the New York Red Bulls on Saturday to remain without a win at its new stadium.

zh.title: 梅西遭拒，迈阿密新主场仍未胜
zh.summary: 国际迈阿密与纽约红牛队2:2战平，尽管莱昂内尔·梅西的后期任意球被扑出，但球队在新球场的不胜纪录仍在延续。这个结果突显了迈阿密尽管拥有足球史上最伟大球员之一，但在新主场仍然面临困境。

title: Eta becomes 1st woman to lead Bundesliga team
summary: Marie-Louise Eta has become the first woman coach to lead a men's team in the Bundesliga, appointed by Union Berlin as they fight for league survival. Her appointment represents a significant milestone for gender representation in top-tier European football.
content: Union Berlin have appointed Marie-Louise Eta as the first woman coach in charge of a men's team in the Bundesliga as they bids to ensure their league survival.

zh.title: 埃塔成为德甲首位女性主教练
zh.summary: 玛丽-路易丝·埃塔被柏林联合任命为首位执教德甲男子球队的女性教练，帮助球队争取联赛保级。她的任命在欧洲顶级足球中代表了性别代表性的重大里程碑。

title: Follow live: Messi, Miami seek first win at new stadium
summary: Inter Miami CF debuts their new stadium looking to achieve their first victory at the new venue, with Lionel Messi leading the team. The match represents a significant milestone for the franchise.

zh.title: 直播：梅西、迈阿密在新球场寻求首场胜利
zh.summary: 国际迈阿密足球俱乐部在新球场首次亮相，力求在新场地实现首场胜利，由莱昂内尔·梅西领导球队。这场比赛对该俱乐部来说是一个重要的里程碑。

title: Lavelle leads U.S. past Japan for 10th straight win
summary: Rose Lavelle scored and assisted as the United States defeated Japan 2-1 on Saturday. The victory marks the U.S. team's 10th consecutive win against Japan in their series.
content: Rose Lavelle had a goal and an assist and the United States won the first of three matches against Japan 2-1 on Saturday.

zh.title: 拉韦尔率领美国击败日本实现十连胜
zh.summary: 罗丝·拉韦尔进球并助攻，美国队在周六以2-1击败日本队。这次胜利标志着美国队对日本队的十连胜。

title: Barça go 9 points clear but insist title not won yet
summary: Barcelona defeated Espanyol 4-1 to extend their LaLiga lead to nine points over Real Madrid with seven matches remaining. Despite the commanding position, manager Hansi Flick emphasized the title race is not yet decided.
content: Hansi Flick says the LaLiga title is not won yet despite seeing his Barcelona team thump Espanyol 4-1 on Saturday to move nine points clear of Real Madrid with just seven games to play.

zh.title: 巴萨领先9分但坚持冠军还未确定
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那以4-1击败西班牙人队，将他们在西甲的领先优势扩大到距皇家马德里9分，还剩七场比赛。尽管处于领先地位，主教练汉西·弗利克强调冠军争夺还未结束。

title: Pulisic's Milan jeered off after shock Udinese loss
summary: AC Milan suffered a shocking 3-0 home defeat to Udinese on Saturday, falling out of the Serie A title race. The loss has left the club concerned about defending their position against teams below them in the standings.
content: After falling out of the Serie A title race, AC Milan is looking nervously at the teams behind it following a shock 3-0 loss at home to Udinese on Saturday.

zh.title: 普利西奇领衔的米兰队在乌迪内斯意外失利后遭嘘声
zh.summary: AC米兰周六在主场以0:3惨败乌迪内斯,跌出意甲争冠行列。这场失利令俱乐部担忧自己能否防守住在联赛中的位置,尤其是面对排名靠后的球队时。

title: Slot hails 'special' Ngumoha after Salah-like goal
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot praised 17-year-old Rio Ngumoha after the teen set up the team's 2-0 victory over Fulham. Slot compared Ngumoha's performance to that of Mohamed Salah, suggesting the youngster has significant potential.
content: Arne Slot compared Rio Ngumoha to Mohamed Salah after the 17-year-old set Liverpool on the way to a 2-0 victory over Fulham on Saturday.

zh.title: 斯洛特赞赏"特别"的恩古莫哈的"萨拉赫式进球"
zh.summary: 利物浦主帅阿尔内·斯洛特在17岁新星里奥·恩古莫哈助攻球队2:0战胜富勒姆后对其大加赞赏。斯洛特将恩古莫哈的表现与穆罕默德·萨拉赫进行了比较,暗示这位年轻球员具有巨大潜力。

title: Ronaldo scores as Al Nassr set record win streak
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo scored in Al Nassr's 2-0 victory over Al Okhdood on Saturday. The win extended Al Nassr's record winning streak and maintained their comfortable lead at the top of the Saudi Pro League standings.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo found the net as Al Nassr claimed a 2-0 victory over Al Okhdood on Saturday to extend their lead at the top of the Saudi Pro League standings.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多破门,阿尔纳斯尔创造连胜纪录
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多周六在阿尔纳斯尔2:0战胜奥赫杜德的比赛中进球。这场胜利延续了阿尔纳斯尔的创纪录连胜纪录,并保持了他们在沙特职业联赛积分榜榜首的舒适领先优势。
